title: TM's Slimeballs
description: A mod that adds a simple slimeball recipe.
body:
This mod adds a recipe for crafting slimeballs. The crafting recipe was inspired by the fact that condensed milk and kelp tend to be quite sticky and slimy.

**The recipe:**

![naprawInternetPlz](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e5b5e020574b4e79af103cecc48fbb60f2d4e0f.png)

_(this recipe is shapeless, put the items wherever you want)_

This mod should be compatible with JEI and shouldn't cause any problems.

Feel free to use it in a modpack that you want to upload, it would be cool if you could mention me in the description :)

 

_This mod was made for a discord user that wanted a slimeball recipe mod (shoutout to you :D)._
